texto: Sometimes I wanted to go to sleep and not wake up. I’d lie awake in bed, wondering, wishing, hoping that I’d close my eyes and then I just … wouldn’t open them ever again.
explicacao: Citação de Brighton Walsh sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Sometimes I wanted to go to sleep and not wake up. I’d lie awake in bed, wondering, wishing, hopi…” articula reflexao, sleep, sometimes em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
